english.note: Specialized in English — from everyday conversation and grammar foundations to executive meetings, presentations, and international interviews.

hero.subtext: We don't teach English. We unlock expression, confidence, and professional presence.

scrollQuotes.q2: "I know more than I can express."
scrollQuotes.q6: "I lost opportunities because I couldn't express myself."

philosophy.label: Philosophy
philosophy.headline: We don't teach.
philosophy.body: Every person carries within them a power that has not yet found its voice. Communication is not just language — it is presence, thought, confidence. That is exactly what we teach.

personalization.label: Unique Experience
personalization.headline: No two
personalization.bodyLead: Every program is designed exclusively around you.
personalization.body: Your goals. Your pace. Your needs. You receive different materials, different guidance, a different approach.
personalization.cardQuote: No two programs are ever the same.

items.title: Assessment Before Start
items.desc: We deeply understand where you are and where you want to go.

items.title: Material Made for You
items.desc: No standardized books. Every resource is specifically selected.

items.title: Deep Feedback
items.desc: Detailed, actionable feedback after every meeting.

items.title: Measurable Progress
items.desc: You see your progress at every stage of the journey.

communication.label: Communication Coaching
communication.headline: Knowing isn't enough.
communication.body: True power is not grammar. It is the ability to think, organize and express yourself clearly and confidently — in every environment.
communication.skillsHint: Click to learn more · double-click to close

skills.title: Professional Presentations
skills.detail: Structure, flow, and presence for meetings, pitches, and conferences — so you sound confident and persuasive, not just grammatically correct.

skills.title: Interviews & Business Meetings
skills.detail: Practice real interview and call scenarios: how you answer, argue your point, and stay composed under pressure.

skills.title: Structured Thinking & Argumentation
skills.detail: Organize your thinking before you speak, build clear arguments, and express ideas with precision — ideal for professionals who need to persuade, not only inform.

skills.title: Leadership Communication
skills.detail: Communication that inspires teams: feedback, clarity, tone, and presence in leadership roles — from team leads to founders.

skills.title: Confidence & Presence
skills.detail: Voice, pace, body language, and mental framing — so you feel at home when speaking English, even under pressure.

skills.title: Critical Analysis & Rhetoric
skills.detail: Analyze texts, ideas, and arguments in English — to express yourself more deeply, precisely, and persuasively in professional settings.

puma.label: The Puma Story
puma.headline: The Power that
puma.p1: The Academy is named Pouma. It is no coincidence.
puma.p2: The Puma has unimaginable power. But that power is invisible when it is still. It only reveals itself when it begins to run.
puma.p3: Every person carries a sleeping Puma within them. The potential exists. The strength exists. The ambition exists.
puma.p4: The English language is not merely a tool. It is the spark that awakens the Puma within you. And with it awakens your presence, your confidence, your voice.
puma.p5: And once the Puma awakens — it never stops.
puma.quote: I don't teach you English. I help you find the voice you always had.

exclusivity.label: Exclusive Groups
exclusivity.headline: Maximum 3–4 people.
exclusivity.body: This is not a classroom. It is private coaching in a small group. Every meeting is focused, deep and personalized. We see you as a person, not a student.

difference.label: Why We Are Different
difference.title: This is not just a school.

personalization.title: Full Personalization
personalization.desc: Every journey is designed exclusively around your goals, pace, and unique needs.

smallGroups.title: Premium Small Groups
smallGroups.desc: Never more than 4 students. Your attention always remains at the center.

methodology.title: Scientific Methodology
methodology.desc: Structured educational approach based on proven language acquisition techniques.

communication.title: Communication, not Grammar
communication.desc: You learn to speak, think and express yourself — not just complete exercises.

criticalThinking.title: Critical Thinking
criticalThinking.desc: You develop analysis, argumentation, and persuasion skills in English.

realLife.title: Real-Life Applications
realLife.desc: Every meeting mirrors real professional and social situations.

items.name: Maria P.
items.quote: Honestly, I used to keep my mic on mute in every Zoom with international clients. By week three I gave a presentation in English without overthinking it — something that had never happened before.
items.transformation: From mute on Zoom, to speaker at an international conference

items.name: Alexander K.
items.quote: It wasn't about vocabulary. In meetings I'd just say 'yes' and 'sounds good' because I didn't know how to join the conversation. Now I speak up, disagree, propose — and the team values it.
items.transformation: From silent dev, to lead on a global team

items.name: Sofia N.
items.quote: I had to close a deal with a supplier abroad and kept getting stuck on emails. Dimitra worked through real drafts with me — not template phrases. In five weeks I sent the proposal on my own.
items.transformation: From Google Translate emails, to B2B negotiations

items.name: Eleni M.
items.quote: I started a new job thinking my English was 'fine enough.' In my first call with HR from London I froze on a simple question. Here I rebuilt foundations — through conversation, not textbooks.
items.transformation: From freezing in interviews, to easy communication with HQ

items.name: Nikos D.
items.quote: Most of my clients are Greek-speaking, but more and more calls are in English. I felt I sounded 'small.' She didn't give me word lists — she gave me space to speak without being cut off.
items.transformation: From awkward on calls, to confident account manager

items.name: Christina L.
items.quote: I had to present a project to a studio in Berlin — over video call. Before, I would have postponed it. We worked the pitch almost line by line, in my own voice. The project got approved.
items.transformation: From fear of international pitches, to accepted proposal

cta.headline: Are you ready to awaken
cta.body: Your first introduction is free. No obligations. No pressure.

hero.label: Evolution Programs
hero.headline: Your journey
hero.sub: Every path is unique. Designed around who you are and who you want to become.

programs.selector: Who do you want to become?

path1.title: Foundation Reset
path1.subtitle: Build the foundations.
path1.description: For those who feel that lack of grammar foundation prevents them from expressing themselves freely. We rebuild the foundations with real communication as the goal.

path2.title: Voice Accelerator
path2.subtitle: Find your voice.
path2.description: Do you have the skills but struggle to express yourself naturally? This path is for you. We focus on fluid, natural communication.

path3.title: Professional Excellence
path3.subtitle: Lead with your voice.
path3.description: For professionals and executives who want to master professional communication. Presentations, meetings, leadership presence.

path4.title: Custom Journey
path4.subtitle: Your goal, your path.
path4.description: Have a specific goal? We design a program exclusively around it.

cta.headline: Not sure which path suits you?
cta.body: Book a free introductory assessment. We'll find it together.

hero.label: Meet Dimitra
hero.headline: I don't teach language.
hero.sub: Every person I work with already has everything they need inside them. All I do is unlock it.

story.label: The Story
story.headline: I began to see something traditional schools ignored.
story.body1: After years of teaching I realized that the problem was never grammar. It was confidence. It was the voice. It was the lack of belief that we deserve to be heard.
story.body2: So I completely changed how I work. I stopped teaching English and started working with people. With their fear. With their strength. With their vision.

items.title: The person comes first
items.desc: I deeply understand each person before I design anything.

items.title: Expression is power
items.desc: My goal is not for you to learn English. It is for you to find your voice.

items.title: No one is left behind
items.desc: Every person has their own rhythm and their own worth.

items.title: Change is human
items.desc: I don't create good students. I create people who dare.

mission.label: Mission
mission.quote: I don't want to create good English students. I want to create people who dare to express themselves — in English and in their lives.

hero.label: The First Step
hero.headline: The transformation
hero.sub: Your first introduction is free. A comfortable conversation to understand together where you are and where you want to go.

form.name: Full Name
form.message: Tell us a little about yourself
form.success: Thank you! We will contact you within 24 hours.

info.title: Information
info.note: Send us the form — we'll reach out to schedule your free introduction.

hero.label: Our Class
hero.headline: The journey continues
hero.sub: Exclusive materials for The Pouma Academy students — articles, extras, and study resources between meetings.

footer.tagline: Your voice deserves to be heard.
